positive: A whimsical, stylized arrangement of celestial bodies and flora: crescent moons, blooming planets with intricate radial symmetry, ethereal nebulae streaks forming constellation maps, and stylized bioluminescent vines wrapping around geometric stellar shards. Composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed as a repeating seamless pattern suitable for fabric print. Style: Minimalist Art Deco meets Cosmic Psychedelic, utilizing a palette of deep midnight blue, soft lavender, burnt orange, and metallic gold accents. Strong outlines and high contrast are essential. The overall mood is magical and awe-inspiring, with clean, sharp edges and silhouettes perfect for textile reproduction. Intricate, non-photorealistic ink drawing style.
negative: photorealism, blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, debris, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, artifacts, low contrast, messy, messy composition, jpeg artifacts
